title: THE DROP - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH THE DROP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe and supportive space for youth and young adults. Services include computers and wifi, charging stations for devices, games, music, movies, laundry, information on social services, coffee and snacks, and a quiet corner with activities. 1340 NW Wall Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 14-29 Hours: Monday/Wednesday 2pm-5:30pm, Tuesday 5pm-6:30pm, Friday 1pm-4:30pm (541) 797-3623 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program Phone (541) 797-3623 Main Phone (541) 322-7554 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Drop In Centers * Youth Issues Laundry Facilities * At Risk Youth Public Internet Access Sites * Youth Issues Youth Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DESCHUTES COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH
